designBrief.silhouette: broad low chassis, obvious rotating turret, single main cannon
designBrief.palette: deep moss-metal with green/teal emissive conduits
designBrief.rtsReadabilityNotes: Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

promptCandidates: Stylized seamless sci-fi vehicle hull texture sheet for a green faction armored frontline combat vehicle in an alien RTS. Material: alien composite shell, grown-metal surfaces. Palette: deep moss-metal with green/teal emissive conduits. Alien design language: semi-organic, flowing conduits, chitinous panels, grav skirt glow. Include armor panel lines, subtle wear, faction markings as abstract glyphs. Forbidden: crane arms, cargo hoppers, multiple long barrels. Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

A seamless, flat orthographic texture sheet for a green armored frontline combat vehicle hull, featuring deep moss-metal surfaces composed of an alien composite shell with organic, grown-metal patterns and intricate bio-luminescent filaments. Across this resilient, dark green plating, bright green/teal emissive conduits pulsate and crisscross, resembling energy pathways embedded within the material itself. The surface is detailed with imaginative alien industrial elements such as interlocking hexagonal plates that subtly shift in depth, bio-etched ventilation ports that look like gills, and small, raised nodules hinting at active sensory arrays, all rendered with no perspective, no baked lighting, and no text, ensuring a pure, unadulterated material swatch.

Generate a flat, orthographic, and seamless texture map depicting the hull of a green armored frontline combat vehicle, where deep moss-metal forms an alien composite shell with rugged, grown-metal surfaces that exhibit crystalline-like formations and subtle bio-mechanical striations. Vibrant green/teal emissive conduits glow brightly, forming a visible lattice of energy pathways that pulse beneath the outer layer. Alien industrial surface details include segmented plating with integrated energy dissipation channels, alien script-like grooves that are purely aesthetic but imply function, and raised, irregular hexagons suggesting reinforcement points, all designed without any perspective, baked lighting, or superimposed text, focusing solely on the intricate, raw material detail.

notes: Gameplay stats are defined in src/data/unitClasses.ts and were not touched.
